notes: The game ran quite well out of the box. However, I did need to lower the graphics settings a little in order to get a steady frame rate.
title: Tower Hunter: Erza's Trial

notes: The game runs out-of-the-box with no issues.  Tested as far as the second part of the first dungeon, beyond which I could go no further (not a technical issue, I just suck).
title: Tower Hunter: Erza's Trial
